name: Crescent Energy Co
business: Crescent Energy Company is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. Its activities are concentrated in the Eagle Ford, Permian, and Uinta Basins in the United States. The company also owns mineral and royalty interests across premier U.S. oil and natural gas basins.

exposures.sentence: Crescent is a differentiated energy company committed to delivering value through a disciplined, returns-driven growth through acquisition strategy and consistent return of capital.
